title: Security audit: UI updates, marketing copy, dust handling, and fee buffers
publicSummary: Security audit by Gemini 3.1 Pro covering UI updates, marketing copy, coin selection dust handling, and network fee buffers. Found zero critical/high/medium findings. One low finding related to E2E test session caching (non-production). Two informational findings related to fee UX improvements. No release blocker.

publication.summary: This report covers UI, test infrastructure, and fee calculation details only. It does not disclose secrets, private user data, descriptors, xpub sets, PSBT base64, UTXO arrays, or operational tokens.
